title: Elytra Crafting Recipe
description: Elytra are now craftable, but are still a end game item. requires dragon's breath and nether star to craft
body:
**Tired of endless hunting for that last End Ship on your server? This mod solves the scarcity problem by adding a balanced, late-game crafting recipe for the Elytra using only Vanilla Minecraft items.**
No new blocks or materials are added! The recipe is designed to be a true end-game challenge, requiring players to conquer all three dimensions:

- The End: Requires Dragon's Breath and.
- The Nether: Requires a Nether Star.
- The Overworld: Requires Phantom Membranes.

**Achieve flight without breaking world boundaries! Perfect for large multiplayer servers and non-linear progression.**


![crafting ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1de576ebb52faefb09da11faa0c4dcb9e48f951b.png)

**Note**: Minecraft might give an error while trying to use the datapack, because it is built for an older version of minecraft. However, it is still fully functional in all minecraft versions starting from 1.13
